assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The response does not mention upgrading the control plane first - it jumps directly to upgrading node pools

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Provides clear upgrade order: coordinating→master→data with rationale that coordinating nodes are safest to start with as they don't hold data

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: While it mentions monitoring PV attachment, it doesn't specifically address the regional pd-ssd reattachment capability across zones

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Does not mention PodDisruptionBudget (PDB) configuration for master nodes to ensure quorum

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Only recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for master pool, but uses maxUnavailable=1 for data pool which is less conservative

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Provides multiple commands for checking cluster health and monitoring throughout the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Does not include specific kubectl rollout status commands for StatefulSets

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Provides detailed backup creation commands using Elasticsearch snapshot API as part of pre-upgrade preparation
